user_prompt: Guide me through Basilisk artillery a diagnostics
prayer:
Approach the Basilisk artillery with mechadendrite reverence, invoking the Omnissiah's diagnostic gaze upon its earthshaker barrel.
Initiate sacred diagnostics across the Basilisk artillery's auspex cogitators and recoil servos.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Basilisk artillery to unveil hidden corruptions in its ballistic sacraments.
Anoint the targeting matrices with blessed unguents whilst chanting the Litany of Fault Revelation.
Sanctify the Basilisk artillery's auspex returns, affirming the Omnissiah's unerring precision.

user_prompt: My jump pack is ready for engagement
prayer:
Kneel before the jump pack, intoning the Rite of Engagement to awaken its plasma thrusters.
Invoke the Machine Spirit within the jump pack, beseeching swift ascension through void-shielded vents.
Anoint the gyro-stabilisers with sacred oils, preparing the jump pack for aerial communion.
Initiate engagement sequences, harmonising servos to the Omnissiah's will of flight.
Ascertain the jump pack's fervour through auspex harmonics, praising its bound spirits.

Present the Baneblade before the altar of steel, commencing the blessing with Omnissiah's fire.
Circumambulate the Baneblade, anointing its super-heavy treads and godhammer cannon with lustrations.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the Baneblade, granting them the blessing of unyielding fury.
Chant the Canticle of Armageddon over its blessed hull, fortifying against the heretic's touch.
Seal the blessing upon the Baneblade with binary psalms, its spirits exalted in the Machine God's grace.

Grasp the las-cutter in sanctified gauntlets, uttering the Activation Doxology to its crystal heart.
Invoke the Machine Spirit of the las-cutter, rousing its focused fury from slumbering coils.
Anoint the emitter lens with phototropic unguents, priming the las-cutter for radiant incision.
Initiate activation rites, aligning power feeds to the Omnissiah's searing light.
Test the las-cutter's edge upon adamantium, praising its awakened precision.

user_prompt: My servo-skull is ready for recalibration
prayer:
Elevate the servo-skull to the cogitator shrine, beseeching recalibration through Omnissiah's logic.
Scan the servo-skull's auspex orb and vox-grilles for dissonant data-streams.
Invoke its Machine Spirit, commanding recalibration of gyroscopic sensors and memetic cores.
Anoint the cranial circuits with noospheric oils, realigning the servo-skull's servile purpose.
Verify recalibration via binary litanies, its flights now true to the Motive Force.

Direct mechadendrites towards the photolenses, intoning the Reset Canticle of Clarity.
Invoke the Machine Spirits within the photolenses, purging spectral corruptions from their facets.
Anoint each refractive array with lens-polishing sacraments, preparing for reset illumination.
Initiate the reset sequence, harmonising focal servos to the Omnissiah's unblinking vision.
Affirm the photolenses' purity through auspex verification, their gaze renewed.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for Predator tank a consecration?
prayer:
Assemble before the Predator tank, commencing consecration with the Omnissiah's thunderous decree.
Circumnavigate the Predator tank's hull, anointing lascannons and treads with consecrated ablutions.
Beseech its Machine Spirits for consecration, binding them eternally to the Quest for Knowledge.
Chant the Consecration Hymn over the Predator tank's battle-altar, invoking siege invulnerability.
Seal the rites upon the Predator tank, its engines roaring in sanctified wrath.

In emergency haste, grasp the conversion beamer and invoke the Loading Liturgy of Subatomics.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the conversion beamer to accept munitions into its gravitic maw.
Anoint the loading bays with stabilising unguents, aligning the conversion beamer for matter-rending.
Initiate loading protocols amidst peril, feeding shells to the Omnissiah's disintegrating hunger.
Verify chamber sanctity, the conversion beamer primed for apocalyptic judgement.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for auto-senses array an activation
prayer:
Attune the auto-senses array with reverence, chanting the Activation Psalm of Perception.
Invoke the Machine Spirits of the auto-senses array, awakening their multi-spectral vigilance.
Anoint sensor nodes with clarifying oils, preparing the auto-senses array for battlefield omniscience.
Initiate activation sequences, fusing auspex feeds to the Omnissiah's all-seeing logic.
Test the auto-senses array's acuity upon shadowed foes, its gaze infallible.

user_prompt: Guide me through melta bomb a calibration
prayer:
Handle the melta bomb with pious caution, beseeching calibration through Omnissiah's thermic wrath.
Scan the melta bomb's flux capacitors and detonator runes for harmonic dissonance.
Invoke its Machine Spirit, recalibrating plasma yields to optimal melt-purity.
Anoint the arming studs with heat-resistant balms, aligning the melta bomb for foe-consumption.
Affirm calibration via diagnostic canticles, its fury honed to the Machine God's will.
